fields.acceptance_criteria: Starting ticket-viewer against a checkout with .ticket/tickets content but no tickets.db rebuilds the local index and serves routes without panicking.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Bootstrap the local ticket store on server startup

fields.acceptance_criteria: Starting ticket-viewer against a checkout with .ticket/tickets content but no tickets.db rebuilds the local index and serves routes without panicking.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Bootstrap the local ticket store on server startup

fields.acceptance_criteria: Starting ticket-viewer against a checkout with .ticket/tickets content but no tickets.db rebuilds the local index and serves routes without panicking.
fields.implementation_summary: ticket-viewer startup now uses an idempotent local-store bootstrap helper that initializes and force-scans the repo-local .ticket store before building the single-workspace registry, so manifest-only workspaces rebuild tickets.db instead of panicking with WorkspaceNotFound.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Bootstrap the local ticket store on server startup
fields.validation_summary: Passed: cargo test -p ticket-viewer --bin ticket-viewer startup_bootstraps_manifest_only_ticket_store -- --nocapture; ./target/debug/ticket-viewer.exe --port 0 (started successfully and printed TICKET_VIEWER_PORT). Blocked unrelated: cargo test -p ticket-viewer fails in tests/workspace_resolution.rs because it imports removed ticket_api::workspace symbols.

fields.acceptance_criteria: Starting ticket-viewer against a checkout with .ticket/tickets content but no tickets.db rebuilds the local index and serves routes without panicking.
fields.implementation_summary: ticket-viewer startup now uses an idempotent local-store bootstrap helper that initializes and force-scans the repo-local .ticket store before building the single-workspace registry, so manifest-only workspaces rebuild tickets.db instead of panicking with WorkspaceNotFound.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Bootstrap the local ticket store on server startup
fields.validation_summary: Passed: cargo test -p ticket-viewer --bin ticket-viewer startup_bootstraps_manifest_only_ticket_store -- --nocapture. Revalidated 2026-05-31: the focused startup regression passed again, and ./target/debug/ticket-viewer.exe --port 0 started successfully and printed TICKET_VIEWER_PORT=61161 before shutdown. Broader cargo test -p ticket-viewer remains blocked by the unrelated workspace_resolution.rs import failure noted during implementation.
